name: Gorgon
description: The Gorgon sports a large magazine that allows it to provide suppressing fire and sustain a high damage rate over a long time. Its high Fire Rate is only achieved following a short wind-up cycle.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: The Gorgon sports a large magazine that allows it to provide suppressing fire and sustain a high damage rate over a long time. Its high Fire Rate is only achieved following a short wind-up cycle.

components.name: Circuits
components.description:
Various electronic components.

Location: Venus, Ceres, and the Kuva Fortress

components.name: Ferrite
components.description:
Alloy pellets used in Grineer manufacturing.

Location: Mercury, Earth, Lua, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Salvage

patchlogs.name: Warframe Revised: Update 27.2.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lech Kril changing to his Gorgon mid swing if you moved out of Melee range.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 20.4.5
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed an issue where the Jackal was dropping Gorgon Wraith Parts. This may or may not be a spoiler for the rewards of the coming Razorback Armada…

patchlogs.name: Octavia’s Anthem: Hotfix 20.2.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed inconsistent alternate Skins naming (Prisma Gorgon is now Gorgon Prisma etc).

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Update 19.5
patchlogs.changes:
Gorgon 90 to 60
Gorgon Wraith 90 to 60
Prisma Gorgon 120 to 80

patchlogs.name: Specters of the Rail: U1.1
patchlogs.changes: Arid Heavy Gunners will now drop the Gorgon Blueprint!

patchlogs.name: Update: Specters of the Rail
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Lech Kril always holding his Gorgon during his melee attack.

patchlogs.name: Update: Lunaro
patchlogs.fixes: •    Fixed the Prisma Gorgon’s firing sounds cutting out randomly.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.6.2
patchlogs.fixes: Gorgon series damage has been reduced in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.5.5 + 18.5.5.1
patchlogs.fixes: •    Reduced the damage of Gorgon series weapons in the Conclaves.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.4.7
patchlogs.changes: Increased the ammo pool of the Prisma Gorgon in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.10.4
patchlogs.changes: Reduced the damage of the Gorgon series in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.8.0
patchlogs.changes: Gorgon Frenzy (Gorgon): On kill, 30% increase in fire rate for 3 seconds.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.3.1
patchlogs.fixes: Players that did not properly receive a weapon slot alongside their Gorgon Wraith may have experienced some issues when purchasing weapon slots since then.  This hotfix will properly fix this issue, and reward each account affected by this problem with a weapon slot on next login.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 17.2.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed lingering issues related to Weapon Inventory slots if users ran the Gorgon Wraith Alert.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.2
patchlogs.changes:
The Gorgon series of weapons has had their damage increased in PvP.
All players that earned a Gorgon Wraith over the recent Survive or DIE event that did not receive an additional weapon slot have received a weapon slot retroactively, regardless if they have kept or sold the weapon.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 16.8.4
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed duplicate entries for the Gorgon that would appear in player profile after killing certain enemies under the effects of Mind Control.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.6.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Strun Wraith and Gorgon weapons not showing the correct Impact / Slash / Puncture stats in the Conclave Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 16.3: The New Protocols
patchlogs.fixes: Increased the damage of the Gorgon in PvP.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 15.11.2
patchlogs.fixes: The Prisma Gorgon is now tradable!

patchlogs.name: Update 14: The Mad Cephalon
patchlogs.changes: Limited the max instances of Karak, Soma, and Gorgon fire sound effects.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Added custom reload sounds for Strun, Dera, Supra, Gorgon, Ignis, Grakata, Acrid, Kraken, Hek, and Lex.

patchlogs.name: Update 7.11.0: Vauban!
